raw_consumer_statement: I was charged for damage ( XXXX EUR ) on a rental vehicle for the time period of XX/XX/year> - XX/XX/year> in XXXX, XXXX and the amount was charged to my credit card. I have not been provided a written copy of the damage report that justifies the charge. The rental company is XXXX XXXX XXXX. I attempted to have my credit card company ( CITI ) dispute the charge, but they did not include a copy of the damage report in their dispute letter. I am continuing to dispute these charges until I have seen a copy of the damage report that details the justification of the damage charges. The rental company has not responded with documentation of a written damage report, despite attempted emails on XX/XX/year>, XX/XX/year>, and XX/XX/year>. My credit card company has not made any effort to receive this documentation either. I am not disputing the charge of the rental car, but rather the charge for the damages.
